title.en: OpenAI Previews GPT-5.6 Sol: A Next-Generation Model

summary.zh: OpenAI发布了GPT-5.6 Sol的预览版，在编程、科学和网络安全等领域展现出更强的能力，并配备了迄今最先进的安全技术栈。这款新模型代表了大型语言模型能力的又一次跃升。
summary.en: OpenAI has previewed GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with enhanced capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with their most advanced safety stack. This new model represents another significant leap in large language model performance.

title.zh: OpenAI与博通联合发布LLM专用推理芯片Jalapeño
title.en: OpenAI and Broadcom Unveil LLM-Optimized Inference Chip 'Jalapeño'

summary.zh: OpenAI与博通合作推出定制AI芯片Jalapeño，专为大型语言模型推理优化，旨在提升AI系统的性能、能效和扩展性。这是科技巨头自研AI硬件以降低对传统芯片依赖的又一重要动作。
summary.en: OpenAI and Broadcom have introduced 'Jalapeño', a custom AI chip built specifically for LLM inference to enhance performance, efficiency, and scalability across AI systems. This is another significant move by tech giants to develop specialized AI hardware.

title.zh: 研究显示AI智能体正在变革工作模式
title.en: New Research Shows How AI Agents Are Transforming Work

summary.zh: OpenAI发布新研究论文，展示AI智能体如何通过处理更长、更复杂的任务来变革工作模式，并在各类职业中提升生产力。这表明AI正从辅助工具向自主执行者演进。
summary.en: A new OpenAI research paper demonstrates how AI agents are transforming work by enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across various roles. This indicates AI is evolving from an assistant to an autonomous executor.

title.zh: 亚洲AI初创公司推出类似Mythos模型，应对Anthropic出口禁令
title.en: Asian AI Startups Launch Mythos-Like Models as Anthropic Export Ban Persists

summary.zh: 随着Anthropic的出口禁令持续，亚洲AI初创公司正推出具备类似Mythos能力的新模型，无需担心出口限制。这可能使美国AI实验室永远失去这个庞大的市场，预示着全球AI竞争格局的深刻变化。
summary.en: Amid ongoing export restrictions on Anthropic, Asian AI startups are launching new models with Mythos-like capabilities, bypassing export bans. This could allow US AI labs to permanently lose this enormous market, signaling a significant shift in global AI competition.

title.zh: G7易流发布穿戴式AI硬件「拍拍豆」，瞄准物流交付场景
title.en: G7 YiLiu Unveils Wearable AI Hardware 'Pat Bean' for Logistics Delivery

summary.zh: 物流科技公司G7易流推出行业首款穿戴式AI硬件「拍拍豆」，重量仅30克，采用磁吸设计，可自动录制物流“最后两米”的交付过程。这体现了AI应用从车辆监控向更精细化交付环节的延伸。
summary.en: Logistics tech company G7 YiLiu has launched the industry's first wearable AI hardware 'Pat Bean', weighing only 30g, which automatically records the final 'two meters' of delivery. This shows AI applications extending from vehicle monitoring to more detailed delivery processes.

title.zh: 理想汽车智能驾驶追赶FSD V14，强调系统协同
title.en: Li Auto's Autonomous Driving Aims to Match FSD V14, Emphasizing System Synergy

summary.zh: 理想汽车正全力追赶特斯拉FSD V14，其竞争焦点已从单纯的模型规模转向模型、数据、算力和芯片之间能否形成高效协同的系统能力。这反映了当前自动驾驶竞赛进入“体系化作战”新阶段。
summary.en: Li Auto is aggressively pursuing Tesla's FSD V14, with its competitive focus shifting from pure model scale to whether model, data, compute, and chip can form an efficient synergistic system. This reflects autonomous driving competition entering a new phase of 'integrated system warfare'.

title.zh: 苹果Vision Pro高管转投OpenAI硬件团队
title.en: Apple Vision Pro Exec Reported to Leave for OpenAI Hardware Team

summary.zh: 负责苹果Vision Pro头显业务的副总裁Paul Meade据报将离开苹果，加入OpenAI的硬件团队。这一高层变动可能预示着OpenAI在AI硬件，特别是空间计算领域的重大布局。
summary.en: Paul Meade, the Apple VP in charge of the Vision Pro headset, is reportedly leaving to join OpenAI's hardware team. This executive move could signal OpenAI's significant strategic move into AI hardware, especially in spatial computing.

title.zh: OpenAI应政府要求限制GPT-5.6推出，称此类限制不应成为常态
title.en: OpenAI Limits GPT-5.6 Rollout After Government Request, Says Restrictions Shouldn't Be Norm

summary.zh: OpenAI在政府要求下限制了GPT-5.6的推出范围，但同时公开表示不认为这种政府审批流程应成为长期默认方式，因为它会阻碍用户、开发者和企业获得最佳工具。
summary.en: OpenAI has limited the rollout of GPT-5.6 per a government request, but publicly stated it doesn't believe this kind of government access process should become the long-term default, as it keeps the best tools from users and developers.

title.en: OpenAI Announces GPT-5.6; DeepSeek Begins Major Hiring

summary.zh: AI行业动态速览：OpenAI正式推出GPT-5.6；中国AI公司DeepSeek宣布计划将所有部门规模扩大至少一倍，显示其强劲的扩张野心。这两条消息分别代表了技术前沿的突破与产业规模的快速扩张。
summary.en: AI industry roundup: OpenAI officially launches GPT-5.6; Chinese AI company DeepSeek announces plans to at least double the size of all its departments, showing strong expansion ambitions. These stories represent breakthroughs at the technology frontier and rapid industrial scaling.

title.zh: 本周看什么：科幻电影《克拉拉与太阳》预告发布
title.en: This Week: Sci-Fi Film 'Klara and the Sun' Trailer Released

summary.zh: 改编自石黑一雄同名AI题材小说的科幻电影《克拉拉与太阳》发布首支预告。故事探讨了人工智能陪伴与人类情感的复杂关系，是近期值得关注的AI文化作品。
summary.en: The sci-fi film 'Klara and the Sun', adapted from Kazuo Ishiguro's AI-themed novel, has released its first trailer. The story explores the complex relationship between AI companionship and human emotion, making it a notable AI cultural work.
